title: cyperus acaulescens
intro: Cyperus acaulescens is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as umbrella papyrus due to its flat, umbrella-like inflorescence. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus acaulescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and roots of the plant are typically used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
